## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Why would it be useful?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have thought about.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, links, or other context that would help evaluate this request.
